name: Microsoft Entra ID
description: Identity provider and directory service. Monitor user access, MFA status, and conditional access policies.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → App registrations
2. Click 'New registration', name it 'CompAI Integration'
3. Under API permissions, add Microsoft Graph (Application):
   - User.Read.All
   - Directory.Read.All
   - AuditLog.Read.All
4. Click 'Grant admin consent'
5. Go to Certificates & secrets → New client secret
6. Copy the Tenant ID, Application ID, and Client Secret below

credentialFields.label: Tenant ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → Overview → Tenant ID.

credentialFields.label: Application (Client) ID
credentialFields.helpText: From your Azure AD app registration → Overview → Application (client) ID.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: From your Azure AD app registration → Certificates & secrets → New client secret.

checks.name: Entra ID App Availability

checks.name: Entra ID Identity & Access
checks.description: Verifies user directory access via Microsoft Graph.

checks.name: Entra ID Access Review
checks.description: Verifies access reviews are configured in Entra ID.
